abstract: Systematically audit website or design visual quality using a 7-dimension framework (typography, color, spacing, layout, components, motion, accessibility) with DFII scoring (Design Feasibility & Impact Index). Output: scored per-dimension breakdown, specific issues with actionable fixes, Quick Wins section highlighting highest-ROI improvements. Uses objective scoring methodology (Impact + Fit + Feasibility + Performance − Consistency Risk) to prioritize fixes and communicate results to stakeholders. Includes anti-patterns, example audits (e-commerce, SaaS, accessibility), and WCAG AA compliance checks.
